
---
title: "Home"
---

<div class="hero-section">

# Welcome to My Personal Website

<img src="profile.jpg" class="profile-photo">

Hi, my name is **Shuyang Liu**. I am a Master of Public Health student in Epidemiology at Emory University.

My interests include public health research, data analysis, epidemiology, biostatistics, and data visualization. This website highlights my academic projects, resume, and professional background.

</div>

## About Me

Originally from China, I hold a B.A. in Psychology from the University of Minnesota (Class of 2024). Currently pursuing my graduate studies, I balance my passion for data and health with a love for the outdoors, specifically through hiking and basketball.

I am interested in using data to better understand public health problems and support evidence-based decision-making. Through my graduate coursework and research projects, I have gained experience in data cleaning, descriptive analysis, regression modeling, and data visualization using SAS, R and Python.

## Skills

- R / RStudio  
- Python  
- Data cleaning and management  
- Descriptive statistics  
- Logistic regression  
- Epidemiologic study design  
- Data visualization  
- Public health research
